branding.name: Shadow Cakes
branding.vibe: Clean, Professional Bakery, Earthy, Reliable, Warm
branding.description: A single-user, database-backed recipe costing app for personal use.

layout_and_spacing.container: mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
layout_and_spacing.surface_treatment: Cardless or Flat Solid. 1px solid border (#E8E3D9), rounded-lg (8px max). No soft drop shadows. Elegant and structural.

navigation.style: Vertical Sidebar or Sticky Top Nav with Crystal Glass or Solid #FDFBF7 background. 1px bottom/right border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C1E16] text-white hover:bg-[#3E2A1F] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E8E3D9] text-[#2C1E16] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#5C554D] hover:text-[#2C1E16] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] px-3 py-1 rounded-md

tables.header: bg-[#F4F1EA] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#5C554D] text-left

forms.input: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E8E3D9] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C57B57]/20 focus:border-[#C57B57] transition-all outline-none
forms.label: block text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.05em] text-[#5C554D] mb-1.5

badges.override: bg-[#D99441]/10 text-[#D99441] border border-[#D99441]/20 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.margin_good: bg-[#4A6B53]/10 text-[#4A6B53] rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium font-mono

motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have explicit hover states (background color shift, text color shift).
motion.page_load: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-2 to 0) for bento grid cards.

images.description: Hand sifting flour into a bowl, earthy warm tone
White dough on brown wooden chopping board

testing.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all iconography. Use Duotone or Regular weights to match the elegant bakery vibe.

Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Tabs. Customize them heavily to remove the default Vercel look (apply flat #FFFFFF backgrounds, 1px #E8E3D9 borders, rounded-md, no shadows).

For the Cost Breakdown Panel and Margin Calculator, use JetBrains Mono for all numeric values and right-align the columns. Highlight positive margins in the success color (#4A6B53) and negative margins in danger (#A63C3C).
For Excel imports, build a clean, Drag & Drop dashed-border area with the 'text_muted' color.
Vendor/Store overrides should be visually distinct. Use the 'warning' badge style to indicate when an ingredient line is using an overridden price.
Do not use generic blue/indigo focus rings. Use focus:ring-[#C57B57]/20 focus:border-[#C57B57] for all form inputs.
Do not use placeholder image URLs. If an empty state needs an image, use the provided Unsplash URLs in the media section.
The app should feel like a premium, warm, 'organic' software tool for an artisan baker, not a sterile IT dashboard.
